item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.description: pBase Head: Working With Coinbase on 1:1 Asset-Backed Tokenized Stocksbr /br /Base head Jesse Pollak said in a post on X that Robinhood Chain’s launch of tokenized stocks in an EVM environment is the right direction. While Base is behind in this area, it is working with Coinbase on a related product

item.title: Strategy Says Bitcoin Reserve Could Cover 31 Years of Dividends Strategy Corporate Treasurer Chaitanya Jain said the company’s Bitcoin reserve could cover approximately 31 years of dividends, while it
item.description: pStrategy Says Bitcoin Reserve Could Cover 31 Years of Dividendsbr /br /Strategy Corporate Treasurer Chaitanya Jain said the company’s Bitcoin reserve could cover approximately 31 years of dividends, while its U.S. dollar reserve could cover around 1.8 years. item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $227M in Net Inflows on July 20 On July 20 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of $227 million, marking the fifth consecutive day of net inflows. U.S. spot
item.description: pSpot Bitcoin ETFs Record $227M in Net Inflows on July 20br /br /On July 20 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of $227 million, marking the fifth consecutive day of net inflows. U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw total net inflows of $38.09 million./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/med

item.title: ENS DAO Approves Two-Year Security Council to Veto Malicious Transactions ENS DAO has approved a new eight-member Security Council with a two-year term and a 5-of-8 multisig. The council may cancel tr
item.description: pENS DAO Approves Two-Year Security Council to Veto Malicious Transactionsbr /br /ENS DAO has approved a new eight-member Security Council with a two-year term and a 5-of-8 multisig. The council may cancel transactions deemed malicious during the two-day timelock after a governance proposal passes,

item.description: pPolymarket Refers Nearly 100 Suspicious Wallets to Law Enforcementbr /br /Polymarket said it has strengthened its insider-trading surveillance and referred nearly 100 suspicious wallets to law enforcement. item.title: Total revenue across all DeFi apps fell to its lowest level since 2024 last quarter. But not all categories suffered the same drawdown. RWA Lending, Physical TCG, and Cedefi all posted their highest r
item.description: pTotal revenue across all DeFi apps fell to its lowest level since 2024 last quarter.br /br /But not all categories suffered the same drawdown.br /br /RWA Lending, Physical TCG, and Cedefi all posted their highest revenue quarters ever./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHNstWnLWsAAdVe1.jpg" /

item.title: Consensys Halted MetaMask Releases Over North Korea-Linked Contractor
item.description: A contractor brought in through a third-party provider worked on MetaMask code from March until Consensys cut off access in April and paused product releases. The company says it found no stolen assets, exposed data or malicious code.

item.title: Two-Thirds of Polymarket World Cup Traders Lost Money According to @defioasis, nearly 130,000 of more than 194,000 unique addresses trading Polymarket’s World Cup winner market recorded losses, repres
item.description: pTwo-Thirds of Polymarket World Cup Traders Lost Moneybr /br /According to a href="https://nitter.net/defioasis" title="defioasis.eth"@defioasis/a, nearly 130,000 of more than 194,000 unique addresses trading Polymarket’s World Cup winner market recorded losses, representing 66.7% of participants. M

item.title: Lighter Makes Stock Tokens Eligible Collateral on Robinhood Chain
item.description: The perpetuals exchange now accepts Robinhood's tokenized equities as margin, expanding beyond the USDG stablecoin and delivering on a plan to broaden collateral in the third quarter.

item.title: Saylor Opposes Bitcoin's BIP-110 in 110-Point Essay
item.description: The Strategy chairman says the anti-spam soft fork would set a censorship precedent worse than the data problem it targets, weeks before an August signaling window.

item.title: Very excited to see this. Will be taking a deep look at this one 🌸
item.description: pVery excited to see this.br /br /Will be taking a deep look at this one 🌸/phr /blockquotebkassandra.gwei (@kassandraETH)/bppit's time.br /i made something for YOU, ethereum userbr /br /a way for you to try out kohaku.br /so you can begin to see the future of privacy on ethereum, firsthandbr /br /th

item.title: Hyperliquid to Open HIP-4 Prediction Markets Behind 500,000 HYPE Stake
item.description: Deployers can set fees of up to 50% but face slashing by validator vote for poorly defined or unsettled markets, under terms Hyperliquid calls preliminary.

item.title: Allbridge Halts Core Bridge After $1.65M Flash Loan Exploit
item.description: The attacker used a $1.12 million Kamino flash loan to skew Allbridge's Solana stablecoin pools, then bridged the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.
